name_en: 🆕 Chip Version F. 💕 Top-tier Original M11546 Blue made of brand-new iconic Monogram Eclipse canvas. This hard-edged Brazza wallet is compact enough for a jacket pocket while easily holding coins, cards, and tickets. 10 x 19 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
